Bash(python3 -c "
with open\('/Users/eogoe2/Downloads/Linkmapper-main/inst/app/www/data/f2_demo.txt'\) as f:
    lines = [l.rstrip\(\) for l in f]

print\('Line 1:', lines[0]\)
print\('Line 2:', lines[1]\)
current = None
for l in lines[2:]:
    if l.startswith\('*'\):
        current = l
    elif l.strip\(\):
        vals = l.split\(\)
        print\(f'{current:15s}  {len\(vals\)} values'\)
")

# Load onemap and inspect draw_map2
library\(onemap\)

# Get the source code of draw_map2
cat\("=== draw_map2 function source ===\\n"\)
print\(draw_map2\)

# Show attributes and signature of map function
cat\("\\n=== map function signature ===\\n"\)
print\(map\)

# Get help on draw_map2
cat\("\\n=== Help on draw_map2 ===\\n"\)
help\(draw_map2, help_type = "text"\)
EOF)

Bash(R --slave --quiet << 'EOF'
library\(onemap\)

# Check kosambi function
cat\("=== kosambi function ===\\n"\)
print\(kosambi\)

# Create a simple example to understand the structure
cat\("\\n=== Creating example sequence object ===\\n"\)
data\("onemap_example_out"\)
twopt <- rf_2pts\(onemap_example_out\)
lg <- group\(make_seq\(twopt, "all"\)\)
seq1 <- make_seq\(lg, 1\)

cat\("\\n=== Sequence object structure \(before map\) ===\\n"\)
str\(seq1, max.level = 2\)

cat\("\\n=== Names and content of sequence ===\\n"\)
names\(seq1\)

cat\("\\n=== seq.num content ===\\n"\)
print\(seq1$seq.num\)

cat\("\\n=== seq.rf content \(before map\) ===\\n"\)
print\(seq1$seq.rf\)

cat\("\\n=== data.name structure ===\\n"\)
print\(class\(seq1$data.name\)\)
print\(names\(seq1$data.name\)\)
print\(dim\(seq1$data.name$geno\)\)
print\(colnames\(seq1$data.name$geno\)[seq1$seq.num[1:5]]\)

EOF)

Bash(R --slave --quiet << 'EOF'
library\(onemap\)

cat\("=== Creating and mapping sequence ===\\n"\)
data\("onemap_example_out"\)
twopt <- rf_2pts\(onemap_example_out\)
lg <- group\(make_seq\(twopt, "all"\)\)
seq1 <- make_seq\(lg, 1\)

# Do the ordering first
seq1_ord <- order_seq\(input.seq = seq1, twopt.alg = "rcd"\)
seq1_force <- make_seq\(seq1_ord, "force"\)

cat\("\\n=== After order_seq \(before map\) ===\\n"\)
str\(seq1_force, max.level = 1\)

# Now map it
cat\("\\n=== Calling map\(\) ===\\n"\)
mapped_seq <- map\(seq1_force\)

cat\("\\n=== Sequence after map\(\) ===\\n"\)
str\(mapped_seq, max.level = 2\)

cat\("\\n=== seq.num \(marker indices\) ===\\n"\)
print\(mapped_seq$seq.num\)

cat\("\\n=== seq.rf \(recombination fractions\) ===\\n"\)
print\(mapped_seq$seq.rf\)

cat\("\\n=== seq.like ===\\n"\)
print\(mapped_seq$seq.like\)

# Extract marker names
cat\("\\n=== Extracting marker names from geno matrix ===\\n"\)
marker_names <- colnames\(mapped_seq$data.name$geno\)[mapped_seq$seq.num]
print\(marker_names\)

# Demonstrate how draw_map2 extracts positions
cat\("\\n=== Position calculation \(like draw_map2 does\) ===\\n"\)
positions <- c\(0, cumsum\(kosambi\(mapped_seq$seq.rf\)\)\)
print\(positions\)

cat\("\\n=== Final map data \(like draw_map2 extracts\) ===\\n"\)
map_df <- data.frame\(
  marker = marker_names,
  pos = positions,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
\)
print\(map_df\)

EOF)

Bash(Rscript -e "
pkgs <- c\('bslib', 'bsicons', 'shiny', 'shinyjs'\)
for \(p in pkgs\) {
  installed <- requireNamespace\(p, quietly = TRUE\)
  ver <- if \(installed\) as.character\(packageVersion\(p\)\) else 'NOT INSTALLED'
  cat\(p, ':', ver, '\\n'\)
}
")

Bash(Rscript -e "
library\(shiny\)
library\(shinyjs\)
library\(bslib\)
library\(bsicons\)

lm_theme <- bslib::bs_theme\(
  version      = 5,
  bg           = '#f7f4ef',
  fg           = '#2a2520',
  primary      = '#4a7c59',
  secondary    = '#d9d2c5',
  success      = '#4a7c59',
  warning      = '#d4820a',
  info         = '#185fa5',
  base_font    = bslib::font_google\('Nunito Sans'\),
  heading_font = bslib::font_google\('Nunito'\),
  font_scale   = 0.95
\)

ui <- bslib::page_navbar\(
  theme  = lm_theme,
  title  = 'LINKMAPPER',
  header = tagList\(
    tags\\$head\(tags\\$link\(rel = 'stylesheet', type = 'text/css', href = 'styler.css'\)\),
    useShinyjs\(\)
  \),
  nav_panel\('Welcome'\),
  nav_panel\('Prior analysis'\),
  nav_panel\('Marker grouping'\),
  nav_panel\('Ordering'\),
  nav_panel\('Linkage mapping'\),
  nav_panel\('Help and FAQs'\),
  nav_panel\('About Us'\)
\)

cat\('UI object created successfully. Class:', class\(ui\), '\\n'\)
cat\('bslib version:', as.character\(packageVersion\('bslib'\)\), '\\n'\)
cat\('bsicons version:', as.character\(packageVersion\('bsicons'\)\), '\\n'\)
" 2>&1)
